headline: How Dividend Consistency and Margin Resilience At Home Depot (HD) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent days, Home Depot highlighted its resilience by reaffirming full-year margin guidance, sustaining 157 consecutive quarterly dividends, and continuing quarterly payments of US$2.33 per share amid a soft home improvement backdrop and housing affordability pressures. At the same time, the retailer’s expanding professional contractor ecosystem, recent acquisitions, and growing digital sales are reshaping its growth profile even as reputational questions around diversity, equity, and...
